chunks.title: Judgment on the Women of Samaria
chunks.reason: A cohesive oracle addressing the elite women of Israel and their impending exile.

chunks.title: Catalog of Divine Warnings
chunks.reason: A series of five distinct historical judgments where God calls for repentance.

chunks.title: Call to Prepare to Meet God
chunks.reason: A concluding call to action followed by a theological description of Yahweh's power.
